mode.recommendedDescription: Start with the settings most people adjust first so the page feels lighter.
mode.advancedDescription: Show the full set, including custom fillers, feedback style, language, and data management.

filler.title: Filler Detection
filler.description: Detect filler sounds, transition fillers, and habitual verbal padding.

speed.title: Pace Monitoring
speed.description: Use {{low}}–{{high}} wpm as the recommended speaking range.

repeat.title: Repeated Connectors
repeat.description: Flag repeated use of the same connector in a short span.

presets.title: Apply a scenario preset in one tap
presets.description: A preset syncs both the pace range and the default filler categories. If you later change pace or filler rules manually, the state switches back to Custom automatically.
presets.customDescription: Tap a preset card again to restore its matching pace range and filler configuration.

goal.title: Pick one goal before each session
goal.description: The chosen goal stays visible during practice, and the report tells you whether you met it and what to fix next.

haptic.title: Haptic Alert
haptic.description: Use a light vibration when a filler is detected.

sound.title: Sound Alert
sound.description: Use a soft sound instead of vibration.
